CREATE TABLE flight_schedule (flight_id INT PRIMARY KEY, departure_date DATE, departure_time TIME, departure_timestamp TIMESTAMP GENERATED ALWAYS AS (departure_date + departure_time));
INSERT INTO flight_schedule (flight_id, departure_date, departure_time) VALUES (1, '2023-10-10', '14:30:00');
INSERT INTO flight_schedule (flight_id, departure_date, departure_time) VALUES (2, '2023-10-11', '16:45:00');
INSERT INTO flight_schedule (flight_id, departure_date, departure_time) VALUES (3, '2023-10-12', '09:15:00');
SELECT departure_timestamp FROM flight_schedule WHERE flight_id = 1;
SELECT flight_id, departure_timestamp FROM flight_schedule WHERE departure_timestamp > '2023-10-10 14:00:00' AND departure_timestamp < '2023-10-11 18:00:00';
SELECT flight_id, departure_timestamp FROM flight_schedule WHERE departure_timestamp BETWEEN '2023-10-10 00:00:00' AND '2023-10-12 23:59:59';
SELECT AVG(departure_timestamp) FROM flight_schedule GROUP BY flight_id;
CREATE TABLE airline_info (airline_id INT PRIMARY KEY, flight_id INT, airline_name VARCHAR(100) REFERENCES flight_schedule(flight_id), departure_timestamp TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO airline_info (airline_id, flight_id, airline_name, departure_timestamp) VALUES (1, 1, 'Air Fast', (SELECT departure_timestamp FROM flight_schedule WHERE flight_id = 1));
SELECT a.airline_name, a.departure_timestamp, f.departure_date FROM airline_info a JOIN flight_schedule f ON a.flight_id = f.flight_id WHERE a.departure_timestamp < current_timestamp;
SELECT f.flight_id, f.departure_timestamp FROM flight_schedule f WHERE f.departure_timestamp = (SELECT MAX(departure_timestamp) FROM flight_schedule);
SELECT flight_id, departure_timestamp FROM flight_schedule WHERE AACHEDOA(departure_timestamp, 'hour', 1) > NOW();
